summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Battle for Rokugan Phase 2+3 features. Backend WebSocket actions fully functional. Frontend UI shows all Phase 2+3 features correctly implemented including Scout/Shugenja/Scorpion abilities, Edit Mode, Territory cards, Round tracker, and Placement counter.

ui_bugs.issue: Edit mode button click doesn't visually toggle state properly

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register and /api/auth/login work with test credentials
Room creation, joining, and game start work
WebSocket game connection and clan selection
Scout card action via WebSocket (use_scout) - returns appropriate responses
Shugenja card action via WebSocket (use_shugenja) - returns appropriate responses
Scorpion spy ability (use_scorpion_ability) - works for Scorpion clan
Territory card play action (play_territory_card) - validates ownership correctly
Upkeep phase with pass_territory_card transitions properly
Edit positions action (edit_positions) - works for host
Frontend login page loads and auth works
Game board renders with token images using placeholder art
Player hand shows combat tokens with correct images (6 tokens visible)
Scout/Shugenja/Scorpion ability buttons appear in bottom right
Edit Mode button visible for host in top bar
Territory cards show in status panel (11 cards visible)
Placement counter shows (0/5) in top bar
Round tracker with 1-5 indicator in top bar (Round 1 highlighted)
Game phase indicator shows PLACEMENT correctly
Current turn indicator shows UNICORN clan
Game board shows 30 provinces and 64 borders as clickable
WebSocket connection established successfully
All Phase 2+3 WebSocket actions process correctly with appropriate error handling

success_percentage.backend: 100% (38/38 tests passed including Phase 2+3 WebSocket actions)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all Phase 2+3 features visible and functional, minor edit mode toggle issue)
